title: Discussion: Psychology in the Workplace
prompt: Think about a workplace challenge you have experienced or observed — it could involve hiring, management, teamwork, job satisfaction, or workplace design. Using concepts from Chapter 13, analyze this challenge from an I-O psychology perspective. Identify which branch of I-O psychology (industrial, organizational, or human factors) would be best suited to address the problem, and propose a specific, evidence-based solution. How might applying psychological research improve this workplace situation?
